ddls:
CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target sequence */,
  "tgt_in_plus" TEXT /* Target sequence on the positive strand */,
  "tgt_in_minus" TEXT /* Target sequence on the negative strand */,
  "inverse_specificity" REAL /* Inverse specificity score of the target */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand information (+ or -) */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the target sequence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the target was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the target was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the target */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the target */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the target */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the target (e.g., active, archived, under review) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the target sequence is derived from */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene the target is associated with */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the target is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_targets_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target sequence */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the target sequence */,
  "tgt_in_plus" TEXT /* Target sequence on the positive strand in this version */,
  "tgt_in_minus" TEXT /* Target sequence on the negative strand in this version */,
  "inverse_specificity" REAL /* Inverse specificity score of the target in this version */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand information (+ or -) in this version */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* GC content of the target sequence in this version */,
  "version_created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was last updated */,
  "version_created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_versions_version_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("version_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_versions_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_versions_version_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("version_created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_targets" (
  "project_target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-target association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target sequence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the association */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the association */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the association */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the association (e.g., active, removed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_targets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_targets_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_targets_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_targets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target sequence */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., specificity, off-target effects) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the analysis was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the analysis */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_analyses_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_analyses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_analyses_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the association was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the association */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the association */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user's role in the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target sequence (if applicable) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the user's browser */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., target, project, analysis) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the permission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the permission (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
